summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OrthoConnect platform - ethical non-commercial orthopaedic platform for India. All core features working excellently including smart search with OpenStreetMap, complete surgeon registration workflow, admin approval system, and conditions hub with embedded search.

minor_bugs.issue: Form submission shows 'Submission failed' error despite all fields being filled correctly
minor_bugs.impact: UI flow works perfectly but final submission fails - likely email validation or duplicate email issue

passed_tests: Home page loads with smart search input and hero section
Smart search: 'knee specialist near 400001' returns results list + OpenStreetMap
Doctor profile loads from search results with complete information and locations accordion
Join as Surgeon flow: complete 4-step process (Account, Practice, Locations with second location added, Document upload)
Admin dashboard shows pending profiles and approval workflow
Profile approval process works - clicked approve and profile moved to approved tab
After approval, smart search finds newly approved profile 'Dr Test Playwright'
Conditions page shows 14 category tiles with images
Condition category navigation: Conditions → Knee → Knee Arthritis
Condition detail page with all 6 sections and embedded search prompt
Smart search with geocoding and radius filtering
Medical disclaimers on all appropriate pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Join as Surgeon form submission error - check email validation or duplicate email handling in the submission process
